questions.question_text: What are the grade of R.C.C mostly used in these days? Explain difference between overall depth & effective depth. What are the merits and demerits of providing Doubly reinforced beams in place of singly reinforced Beams? What are the basic assumptions of bending of beam? Define singly & doubly reinforcement beam. Why the effective depth is adopted in design of beam/slab? Define the term moment of resistance of a RCC beam section? Show reinforcement detail in staircase with neat sketches.
Explain stress strain relation for concrete & reinforcement steel.
What are basic assumptions made in working stress design method of RCC.
Explain design of singly reinforcement R.C.C beam by SP-16.
Draw deflected shape of singly RCC beam. Explain the following terms Neutral axis Tension Zone Compression Zone
Explain working stress method and limit state method of RCC beam?
Write down the steps for design of doubly reinforcement beam.
What are the types of Slabs and explain the procedure of design of slab in RCC using IS codes.
Explain design procedure of RCC staircase as per IS codes.
